vocab.example: To be honest, I didn't enjoy it much because I was highly susceptible to motion sickness during long hauls.

vocab.meaning: chuyến đi vòng để ngắm cảnh
vocab.example: My father loved taking a scenic detour, which allowed us to discover hidden gems off the beaten track.

vocab.meaning: bị chật chội, thiếu không gian
vocab.example: With three siblings in the backseat, we were often cramped for space, making the journey quite uncomfortable.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thoát ly thực tại (để thư giãn)
vocab.example: Watching the world go by through the car window gave me a wonderful sense of escapism as a child.

vocab.meaning: hành trình dài dằng dặc (có vẻ không bao giờ kết thúc)
vocab.example: Back then, a three-hour drive felt like an interminable journey to my younger self.

vocab.meaning: các địa điểm tham quan ven đường
vocab.example: I always looked forward to stopping at various roadside attractions to stretch my legs and grab a snack.

vocab.meaning: kết nối/thắt chặt tình cảm gia đình
vocab.example: Car trips were a golden opportunity to bond with family through sing-alongs and word games.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác cuồng chân/bứt rứt do bị nhốt trong không gian hẹp quá lâu
vocab.example: After several hours on the road, I would often get cabin fever and grow quite restless.
I loved seeing the changing landscapes unfold before my eyes as we drove from the city to the coast.

vocab.meaning: người ngồi sau hay chỉ đạo tài xế (thường gây khó chịu)
vocab.example: I remember being a bit of a backseat driver, constantly asking my dad why he wasn't overtaking other cars.
